content:
from pydantic import BaseModel
from typing import Optional

class Todo(BaseModel):
    id: Optional[int] = None  # Will be assigned by backend
    title: str
    description: Optional[str] = None
    completed: bool = False

metadata.explanation:
This Pydantic model defines the structure for a Todo item. It inherits from `BaseModel` to leverage Pydantic's data validation and serialization capabilities. 
- `id`: An optional integer field, as it will typically be assigned by the backend upon creation.
- `title`: A mandatory string field for the todo item's title.
- `description`: An optional string field for more details.
- `completed`: A boolean field with a default value of `False`, indicating whether the todo item is finished.

This structure aligns with Pydantic V2 best practices, using standard type hints and `BaseModel` for schema definition. No specific external packages beyond `pydantic` are required for this model definition itself.
